- [ ] Frontend Agent
- [ ] Backend Agent

- [ ] DevOps Agent

- [ ] Security Agent

## Task Description

Describe the task for the agent to implement.

## Context

### Related Issues / PRs

- Related to #

### Relevant Files

- `path/to/file.ts`

### Dependencies

- [ ] Depends on #
- [ ] Blocked by #

## Requirements

### Functional Requirements

1. Requirement 1
2. Requirement 2

### Non-Functional Requirements

- Performance: [e.g., < 200ms response time]
- Security: [e.g., RBAC enforcement required]
- Accessibility: [e.g., WCAG 2.1 AA]

## Implementation Hints

Provide any architecture guidance, code patterns to follow, or constraints.

```typescript
// Example code pattern or interface to implement
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests written for new functionality
- [ ] No TypeScript errors
- [ ] No lint warnings

## Handoff Requirements

### Input (what the agent receives)

- Data / props / schemas

### Output (what the agent delivers)

- Files created / modified
- Tests written
- Documentation updated

## Estimated Complexity

- [ ] Small — Single file, < 50 lines changed
- [ ] Medium — 2-5 files, < 200 lines changed
- [ ] Large — 5+ files, < 500 lines changed
- [ ] XL — Major feature, 500+ lines changed
